data.content: Implementation review failed. Browser verification on http://localhost:3001/beats still shows stale repository content during a repo switch: with a 2s browser-only delay on /api/beats/query, switching repos updates the URL and repo selector immediately but keeps old rows visible for at least 500ms instead of clearing the view and showing a loading state. Static gates passed (lint with one existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx, tsc, test, build).
